notes: The odoo adaptor delegates to the odoo-await npm client, which actually transports over XML-RPC (POST /xmlrpc/2/common and /xmlrpc/2/object, text/xml) using authenticate() and execute_kw(). OpenAPI cannot faithfully model XML-RPC method dispatch and the mocker needs JSON, so this document synthesizes Odoo's equivalent JSON-RPC web endpoints (/web/session/authenticate and /jsonrpc) which carry the same semantics. Operation coverage maps create/read/write/unlink/search/search_read; seed schemas model a generic Record and res.partner (Partner).
